data.markdown:
# Database Schema (ERD)

The PK Locker database is built on MongoDB, focusing on the hierarchy between the Shopkeeper (Owner) and the assets (Devices, Keys, Payments) they manage.

```mermaid
erDiagram
    SHOPKEEPER ||--o{ DEVICE : manages
    SHOPKEEPER ||--o{ KEY : owns
    SHOPKEEPER ||--o{ KEY_ORDER : requests
    DEVICE ||--o{ EMI_PAYMENT : has
    
    SHOPKEEPER {
        string name
        string email
        string shopName
        string role
        boolean isActive
    }
    
    DEVICE {
        string imei
        string model
        string status "Active / Locked"
        string platform "Android / iOS"
        boolean isDeregistered
    }
    
    EMI_PAYMENT {
        number amount
        date dueDate
        string status "Paid / Unpaid"
        date paidAt
    }
    
    KEY {
        string platform
        number totalKeys
        number usedKeys
    }
    
    KEY_ORDER {
        number numKeys
        string platform
        string status "Pending / Approved"
        string screenshotBase64
    }
```
data.title: Database Schema Overview
